ab: marenang ku kan nanalli muka muwadrangiya a uninan.
en: I went out with my mother today.

ab: tremangiya na langitr a uninaninan. adri llitek aw adri bias na wari. salaw ayaw na bali.
ch: 白天的天空很藍，天氣不冷也不熱，風很涼爽。
en: The sky is blue during the day, the weather is neither cold nor hot, and the wind is cool.

ab: kadru mi kana traluwalun mekan dra mēn-paw. an tu kadaway mi i, salaw mi sadeku.
ch: 我們在草地上吃著麵包，陽光灑在身上，非常溫暖。
en: We ate bread on the grass, the sun was shining on us, and it was very warm.

ab: paelipas dra karealliyan i, midraradrarang na kutrem i langitr.
en: In the afternoon, the sky turned red.

ab: ku kiyumallay i nanalli dra, “daw midraradrarang na kutrem i langitr?”
ch: 我問媽媽：「為甚麼天空是紅色的？」
en: I asked my mother why the sky is red.

ch: 媽媽說：「可能是颱風要來了吧？」
en: Mom said, maybe the typhoon is coming.

ab: aremeng lla i, uniyan dra kutrem i langitr. mupatraran lla na triur.
ch: 晚上天上沒有雲，星星出來了。
en: There were no clouds in the sky at night, and the stars came out.

ab: a muwaruma mi i dalan i, kianun ku kana triur.
ch: 在回家的路上，我跟星星許願。
en: On the way home, I made a wish with the stars,

ab: adri padradruwai na bariwan. maranger ku driya muka muwadrangiya!
ch: 希望颱風不要來，我還想再出去玩呢！
en: I hope the typhoon doesn't come, I still want to go out to play again.
